mapper.sql: food_id, name, price, description, image, category_id, store_id, rating, sales, tags, status, create_time, update_time
mapper.update: UPDATE foods SET name = #{name}, price = #{price}, description = #{description}, image = #{image}, category_id = #{categoryId}, store_id = #{storeId}, rating = #{rating}, sales = #{sales}, tags = #{tags}, status = #{status}, update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE food_id = #{foodId}
mapper.select: SELECT f.*, c.category_name, s.store_name FROM foods f LEFT JOIN categories c ON f.category_id = c.category_id LEFT JOIN stores s ON f.store_id = s.store_id WHERE f.status = 1 ORDER BY f.create_time DESC

SELECT f.*, c.category_name, s.store_name FROM foods f LEFT JOIN categories c ON f.category_id = c.category_id LEFT JOIN stores s ON f.store_id = s.store_id WHERE f.category_id = #{categoryId} AND f.status = 1 ORDER BY f.rating DESC

SELECT f.*, c.category_name, s.store_name FROM foods f LEFT JOIN categories c ON f.category_id = c.category_id LEFT JOIN stores s ON f.store_id = s.store_id WHERE f.store_id = #{storeId} AND f.status = 1 ORDER BY f.sales DESC

SELECT f.*, c.category_name, s.store_name FROM foods f LEFT JOIN categories c ON f.category_id = c.category_id LEFT JOIN stores s ON f.store_id = s.store_id WHERE f.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{name}, '%') AND f.status = 1 ORDER BY f.rating DESC

SELECT f.*, c.category_name, s.store_name FROM foods f LEFT JOIN categories c ON f.category_id = c.category_id LEFT JOIN stores s ON f.store_id = s.store_id WHERE f.rating >= #{minRating} AND f.status = 1 ORDER BY f.rating DESC
